name: bigsearch-cursor-plugin
description: PublishToAI CLI, MCP server, and Cursor plugin

scripts.build: npm run build -w @bigsearch/web4page-spec && npm run build -w @bigsearch/cli && npm run build -w @bigsearch/mcp && npm run build -w @publishtoai/cli && npm run build -w publishtoai
scripts.build:cli: npm run build -w @bigsearch/web4page-spec && npm run build -w @bigsearch/cli
scripts.build:publishtoai: npm run build -w @bigsearch/web4page-spec && npm run build -w @publishtoai/cli && npm run build -w publishtoai
